task: Review the previous research and identify any new developments since the initial analysis. Focus on: 1) Any major announcements from key players, 2) Landscape changes, 3) Updated assessments or data. Append your findings to the existing research context.

Re-evaluate the previously recommended actions based on the updated research. Provide: 1) Updated priority rankings, 2) Any changes to recommendations, 3) New opportunities that emerged, 4) Any actions to deprioritize. Reference both original and follow-up research.
